name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Autonomous GTM operating system. 15 agents, 28 commands, 16 skills, 5 cloud routines. Multichannel orchestration (Meta Ads + Google Ads at parity), AARRR funnel diagnostics, Tribe v2 neural pre-testing, the High-Velocity Advertising (HVA) engine for creative discovery at machine speed (CLEAR + deterministic scorer + the Vault moat), browser QA (Playwright + Computer Use), cross-channel attribution, codebase-aware asset generation, and always-on optimization via Claude Code Routines.
